name: ArchiveBox
compose:
name: slashnode-archivebox
services:
  archivebox:
    image: archivebox/archivebox:0.7.4
    container_name: archivebox
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      ALLOWED_HOSTS: '*'
      ADMIN_USERNAME: admin
      ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      PUBLIC_INDEX: 'True'
      PUBLIC_SNAPSHOTS: 'True'
      PUBLIC_ADD_VIEW: 'False'
    volumes:
      - archivebox_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8006:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  archivebox_data:
    name: slashnode-archivebox_archivebox_data
